channel.title: Contacts on Nicholas Lacourse
channel.description: Recent content in Contacts on Nicholas Lacourse

item.title: Contact
item.description: If you are a fellow academic or someone from industry that would like to collaborate on any work or have any questions, suggestions, or advice about my work, you can reach me most easily with the below contacts: Email : nicholaslacourse.official@gmail.com Personal Mobile # : +1 (936) 689-2207
